calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-05-2007 Dismissal Of Entire Action Filed (Sweep)

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar May-08-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, CSR: Dave Davenport
John P. Strouss, III, Esq., for Petitioner: Marla Williams, present as Guardian ad litem for: Michelle Cox, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved for Claimant Michelle Fox, as follows:
Settlement: $9,250.00
Medical Expenses $3,249.52
Costs $312.68
Attorney Fees: $2,034.33
A net balance of $3,653.47 deposited in Annunity at Hartford Life Insurance Company. At age 18, a lumpsum payment of $4,700.00 to be made to the minor.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim signed in open court.
